item.title: Call to action: archive a video. YouTube pulls video of the Australian news story of Trump and Epstein's friendship.
item.description: https://youtu.be/qMIP4RIoCHc?si=uRR5LmH9YVShet6u Archive video: https://archive.org/details/60-minutes-australia-trump-epstein Someone more technically knowledgeable should download and archive it to more sources for the USA audience. Edit: it is back up for me at 00:41 Greenwich Mean Time in the USA
item.dc:creator: RenegadeSci

item.title: F*ck School
item.description: Every comic you see is like the tip of an iceberg – there’s so much that goes into creating it that you never get to see. We pour our hearts and souls into this, often working long hours fueled by nothing but passion (and maybe a little too much coffee). If you love what we do, please consider joining our Patreon. You’ll get early access, secret comics, and a peek behind the curtain. Plus, you’ll be keeping the dream alive. PS: https://www.patreon.com/join/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1445 (Wizardposting Sunday)
item.description:
I should note that this is pretty much wizards, witches, sorcerers, and any other magic user shitposting in these wizardposts, but anyway, let's get this bread.
Well, shit.
Bonus shot of me goofing around in wizard garb, feel free to meme.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: *sticks beak up my nose* "no." Today's message from Baja: "[wolf whistle] I love you baby" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: He is the embodiment of gratitude.
item.dc:creator: Usteepolson

item.title: 23-year-old who is 350 lbs isn't giving himself any excuses to better himself
item.dc:creator: TheCoolDad

item.title: It's meme dump day... Again... Vol 142 with bear tax!
item.description:
Hello friends, I always think it's been like a week since I've posted and then realize it's been a month. No wonder my phone is out of space again. Here are some memes!
I hope y'all are navigating the horrors okay.
:) just a silly little girl over here
*letterkenny skids voice* The Dark Web!
.
At least 100 times a day
Also my actual notebooks cuz I'm a weirdo who still writes a lot in notebooks
The new Chevelle album is really good. Can't wait for the new Deftones. Bad years always have good albums
I've ruined my attention span and suck at reading but I really want to get back into my TBR
Basically
Yes I poorly edited this from evangelical lol
We can be spooky about it
.
Hey guess what I still haven't done? Made a fucking appointment to get diagnosed. I got my kid diagnosed and recognize a shit ton of my behaviors in him that's close enough right?
*shrugs*
.
Worth it
This is a post about climate change.
Huzzah, I'm living the dream. I just got a new thigh piece. Finishing the color next week
Hahahaha oh no here the men come in the comments but look this is objectively hilarious.
I just want to know what capricorns did to everybody because I never seem to see anything nice about us lol
DEEPLY FELT
eyyy tis the season to get vaccinated
He's perfect
Oops
Ok so my husband is a spicy food fanatic and let me just say this post is very accurate.
.
Both? Both is good
.
Has anyone figured this out?
I do text my friends to look at the moon for real. The other day @danat101 said the moon made her think of me and I was so fuckin touched.
I think a lot of people think I'm a witch. Ever since a witch told me I was one I just kinda leaned into the assumption. I'm mostly just super into nature though.
.
.
So tired of seeing people, especially children, graphically murdered on my phone screen, paid for by my tax dollars.
So hot.
.
Hahaha but also yes.
Phew the accuracy
EVERYTHING. STOP IT.
Losing hope really hard lately
Please. Anywhere but here lol
See look how behind I am this was like a million years ago in 2025 time
Basically
My friend keeps saying he's gonna build one and put it in his front yard.
We spent our 15th wedding anniversary in TN visiting the Great Smoky national Park and it was hella beautiful
A bear came and visited the front porch of our cabin isn't he THE CUTEST?!???
Had to check out the bear poop that was previously in the road. Then stamped around for a bit then wandered off over the hill.
Fantus tax
Hobbes tax!
item.dc:creator: kaeldra

item.title: U.S. Navy divers gently carry the ashes of Pearl Harbor survivor Harvey Milhorn, returning him to his fallen shipmates aboard USS Arizona (BB-39). More than eight decades after the attack, he comes home at last, resting forever in the steel tomb
item.description: U.S. Navy divers gently carry the ashes of Pearl Harbor survivor Harvey Milhorn, returning him to his fallen shipmates aboard USS Arizona (BB-39). More than eight decades after the attack, he comes home at last, resting forever in the steel tomb where 1,177 brothers still keep watch. ~DS Rock
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Are these cropped better? Trump related
item.description:
Obviously AI, but I think this is closer to what donny expected than what he got.
It says reportedly. "The word around town is... " Validity is in question, but expectations are high.
